mapper.select: SELECT A.HOMPI_ID, B.TODAY_CNT, C.NAME FROM HOMPI A INNER JOIN HOMPI_DAILY_STATS B ON A.HOMPI_ID = B.HOMPI_ID INNER JOIN USER_BASIC C ON A.OWNER_USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE 1=1 AND B.DAY_STATS_DATE = #{todayDate} AND B.TODAY_CNT != 0 ORDER BY B.TODAY_CNT DESC,A.TOTAL_CNT DESC,A.INSERT_DT LIMIT 10
